---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to scpcR
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

What would you like scpcR to do?

## Why this belongs in scpcR

Is this about the public API, `scpc` result methods, coordinate handling, clustering, exact vs approximate computation, docs/examples, or packaging/CI?

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Additional context

Examples, code snippets, related issues, or parity expectations versus `scpc-python` or other implementations.
